title: HII Authenticates Keel of Virginia-Class Attack Submarine Arkansas (SSN 800)
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 19, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS) division hosted a keel authentication ceremony today for Virginia-class submarine Arkansas (SSN 800).

title: 6 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average and median increase of 8.8%.

title: Merck, Nike Among 14 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In The Second Half Of November
text: There were a few double-digit boosts in the first half of November. Most notably, ADP came through with a 20% increase and Snap-On Tools with a 14% increase. Emerson extended its dividend growth streak to 66 years with a 1% boost and Lancaster Colony started its 7th decade of dividend growth with a 6% increase.

title: Huntington Ingalls - An Undervalued Dividend Payer
text: Huntington Ingalls is a 2.2% yielding defense giant operating in the shipbuilding industry. While its yield isn't that high, the company is in a terrific place to accelerate shareholder distributions in the years ahead.

title: Media Advisory — Newport News Shipbuilding to Host Ceremonial Keel Authentication of Arkansas (SSN 800)
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 09, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- About HII

title: HII Wins U.S. Air Force $70 Million Technical Analysis and Research Contract to Support AI/ML and Cyber Modernization Priorities
text: MCLEAN, Va., Nov. 09, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Mission Technologies division was awarded a $70 million task order contract by the U.S. Air Force to perform technical analysis and recommend enhancements for the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL). HII's research and analysis will be leveraged by the Air Force to support the Department of Defense's artificial intelligence/machine learning and cyber modernization priorities.

title: HII Makes Positive Impact with Third Annual Global Day of Caring Initiative
text: MCLEAN, Va., Nov. 08, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Mission Technologies division hosted its annual Global Day of Caring on Saturday, Nov. 5. More than 300 employees and their family members completed community service projects in Arizona, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Massachusetts, Nevada, Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, Texas, Virginia, Washington and South Korea.

title: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (HII) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (NYSE:HII ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 3, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Christie Thomas - Vice President of Investor Relations Chris Kastner - President & Chief Executive Officer Tom Stiehle - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Doug Harned - Bernstein Robert Spingarn - Melius Research David Strauss - Barclays George Shapiro - Shapiro Research Seth Seifman - JPMorgan Gautam Khanna - Cowen Ron Epstein - Bank of America Noah Poponak - Goldman Sachs David Strauss - Barclays Christie Thomas Thank you, operator and good morning, everyone. Welcome to the HII Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Media Briefing: HII To Reveal New UUV Design
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- This briefing is restricted to journalists.

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Q3 Earnings Miss, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Huntington Ingalls' (HII) Q3 revenues of $2,626 million miss the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 2.2%. However, the top line improves 12.3% year over year.

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Misses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.55% and 2.22%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: HII Reports Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) reported third quarter 2022 revenues of $2.6 billion, up 12.3% from the third quarter of 2021, primarily driven by revenue attributable to the acquisition of Alion Science and Technology (Alion) in the third quarter of 2021, as well as revenue growth at Newport News Shipbuilding.

title: HII Increases Quarterly Dividend to $1.24 per Share
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 02, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.24 per share, a $0.06 increase over the $1.18 per share dividend paid in each of the prior four quarters. The $1.24 per share dividend will be payable on Dec. 9, 2022, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on Nov. 25, 2022.

title: HII-Built Aircraft Carrier & Shipbuilders Get National Spotlight on Veterans Day
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Nov. 02, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- When men's college basketball teams Gonzaga and Michigan State face-off next week on an aircraft carrier in San Diego, shipbuilders and veterans from HII (NYSE: HII) and its Newport News Shipbuilding division will share in the national spotlight.
